  "findings": [
    "Insufficient anchor bolt projection above the nut",
    "Non-compliance with API RP 686 thread engagement requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further baseplate installation and grouting",
    "Verify actual thread engagement and bolt projection length",
    "Initiate rework to extend or replace anchor bolts to meet API RP 686 minimum projection standards"
  ],
  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires anchor bolts to have a minimum projection above the nut (typically at least 1.5 threads or a minimum length depending on the specific section). Insufficient projection prevents proper thread engagement and tensioning, which compromises the structural integrity of the machinery foundation. Because the work is in-progress, it must be halted and failed at this quality gate before grouting or equipment mounting occurs.",

    "API RP 686 Chapter 4"
  ]
